title: Cascade-Correlation on XOR
summary: A tiny cascade-correlation-style growth trace for XOR.
learning_objectives: See why a linear output layer alone cannot solve XOR.
Add one hidden feature selected for residual correlation.
Freeze the hidden feature and retrain the output layer.
limitations: This is a toy mechanism demonstration, not a full reproduction of Fahlman and Lebiere (1990).
Candidate search is intentionally tiny and deterministic.
